title: Boz (disambiguation)
content:
'''Boz''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Boz]]''', a [[tauntaun]]
*'''[[Boz Pity]]''', a [[planet]]
*The '''[[Boz Pity system]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Boz (customs agent)|Boz]]''', a [[Customs official/Legends|customs agent]] on the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|Jubilee Wheel]]
*'''[[Boz (deity)|Boz]]''', the [[Calian]] creator [[Deity/Legends|god]]
*'''[[Boz (Lizling)|Boz]]''', a [[Lizling]]
*'''[[Boz Addle]]''', a [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] [[Technician/Legends|engineer]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
*The '''[[Boz Pity Salient]]'''
*The '''[[Boz Pity system/Legends|Boz Pity system]]'''
